title: Evas and S2 Engines
wikitext:
[]: Evas and S2 Engines             Quote Post by V » Fri Mar 14, 2008 12:17 pm "Why don't Evas have S2 Engines?" Angels and Adam do but the Evas do not. Arguably Lilith might not have had one, we're not sure. Theories I have heard are that: *Adam somehow prepared the Angels with S2 Organs; this theory would mean that Adam can only create a limited number of Angels if Adam herself cannot create a new S2 Organ; the result of this would be that attempts to make NEW S2 Organs from scratch would always fail....however, this would not at all explain how eventually they DID figure out how to make artificial S2 Organs for the MP Evas. So I don't think this is correct. *Angels are just inherently capable of generating their own S2 Organs. This does raise the question: if the Evas are based on Adam's genetic material....why do they not also have S2 organs like Adam? The question might be raised "did Adam actually have an S2 Organ" but the "giant of light" images we've seen do seem to show a Core present, etc. All evidence to Adam's awesome powers seem to imply presence of an S2 Organ. My explanation of "why can't they make S2 Organs even though Adam had one" was always simply (Occam's Razor) : "Gehirn didn't understand yet how to grow new S2 Organs, one of the limitations of the Evas being "just clones" and not the original. Eventually they refined their knowledge of S2 Organs (through examining Shamshel, etc.) to the point that they could successfully grow it." Not unlike a data file that has been copied too many times and gotten damaged as a result, the biological limitations of the cloning process simply did not let them recreate the S2 organ because it was too complicated. But later they DID figure out how to make it properly.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 14, 2008 12:39 pm last explanation always made the most sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Mar 14, 2008 2:46 pm Adam has an S2, they mention it in ep21' It's possible that S2's aren't even part of their natural genetic make-up, but something perhaps "given" or "endowed". Just because the Lilin have the fruit of knowledge doesn't mean all Lilin are knowledgeable or smart.

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Fri Mar 14, 2008 3:49 pm Evas are made from Adam, they're not Adam itself. They probably just couldn't reproduce one when they were developing the Evas, and I imagine that would make them even more dangerous when they go out of control.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 3:54 pm A major one V forget: the DNA that encodes for the S2 organ was intentionally engineered out, probably as a safety precaution of some kind. But this idea would need to be expanded to take other things into consideration... An idea I always liked is that some kind of metabiological element (i.e., spiritual component) is required for native development of the S2 to occur. (Don't ask me exactly how this works -- "animu" and all.) The Angels get their souls from Adam, and hence they are equipped to grow their own S2s. The Evas are developed artificially and must be given souls from preexisting lifeforms, none of whom are Adam-derived; hence, they cannot grow their own S2s.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Mar 14, 2008 7:02 pm Perhaps it has something to do with the angels gestation, As the angels grew from embryos and the evas are clones meaning the evas had no maturation period. Maybe theres some important stage in angel maturation where the s2 is grown or stimulated or something. just a guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 14, 2008 7:05 pm No clone is perfect. Obviously the S2 organ isn't something that could be reproduced.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 14, 2008 7:27 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: No clone is perfect. Obviously the S2 organ isn't something that could be reproduced.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 7:53 pm slothen wrote: doesn't make sense considering that they were able to be reproduced.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 14, 2008 7:56 pm Reichu wrote: Incidentally, they were "installed" into the harpies, which means Nerv never figured out how to grow Eva and S2 together.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 8:32 pm Artificial and organic are not mutually exclusive. They were based on Shamshel's. It makes more sense to think they were indeed organic than not, from what I can see.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 14, 2008 8:53 pm organic = carbon-based

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Mar 14, 2008 9:01 pm I wonder if V read this- http://www.evageeks.org/FGP/Theory:S%C2%B2_Engine%27s_Absence_in_Evangelions

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Mar 15, 2008 2:33 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I wonder if V read this- http://www.evageeks.org/FGP/Theory:S%C2%B2_Engine%27s_Absence_in_Evangelions

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 15, 2008 3:09 pm V wrote: My guess to the logic of this is that: the MP Evas were intentionally built using the jerry-rigged Dummy Plug system, so they actually DO NOT contain human souls, and are thus NOT "the union of the Fruit of Knowledge and Fruit of Life". Eva-01 possesses a human soul so she IS "aware" the way humans are and possesses both. Hmm...that makes sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 3:13 pm V wrote: It's odd that ***Seele seems really angry that Eva-01 becomes a Living God once it gets an S2 Organ, but then went and made the MP Evas with them.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 15, 2008 3:21 pm Reichu wrote: Ornette wrote: Then you can generate AT Fields without souls? Also, isn't the reason they use Eva-01 is not because of the soul in it but because it was made from Lilith (FoK?)?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Mar 15, 2008 3:29 pm Ornette wrote: Then you can generate AT Fields without souls? Also, isn't the reason they use Eva-01 is not because of the soul in it but because it was made from Lilith (FoK?)?

[]:             Quote Post by Furu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 3:52 pm I don't think they would have put an actual research subject, much less one ripped directly from an Angel, into an Eva that was just undergoing testing. It seems like a monumentally bad idea. ... Not that it didn't turn out to be a bad idea regardless.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 4:53 pm V wrote: ***Question: Was Eva-04 fitted with an "artificial S2 Organ" or "the repaired S2 Organ of Shamshel itself?"
